---
title: "conditionalcov"
generated: true
description: "Covariance of `X` conditioned on the variables in `Y`."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.covariance`](../nitrix-stats-covariance.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:conditionalcov -->
```python
conditionalcov(X: Num[Array, '... c obs'], Y: Num[Array, '... d obs'], *, rowvar: bool = True, bias: bool = False, ddof: Optional[int] = None, weights: Optional[Num[Array, '... obs']] = None, weight_matrix: Optional[Num[Array, '... obs obs']] = None, l2: float = 0.0, residualise_l2: float = 0.0) -> Num[Array, '... c c']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:conditionalcov -->
Covariance of `X` conditioned on the variables in `Y`.

Operationally: residualise `X` against `Y`, then take the
covariance of the residuals.  This is the "explained out the
Y subspace, look at what's left" view.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:conditionalcov -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `X` | `Num` | `...` × `c` × `obs` | — | Variable / conditioning tensors. |
| `Y` | `Num` | `...` × `d` × `obs` | — | Variable / conditioning tensors. |
| `rowvar` | `bool` | — | `True` | See `cov`. |
| `bias` | `bool` | — | `False` | See `cov`. |
| `ddof` | `Optional[int]` | — | `None` | See `cov`. |
| `weights` | `Optional[Num[Array, '... obs']]` | — | `None` | See `cov`. |
| `weight_matrix` | `Optional[Num[Array, '... obs obs']]` | — | `None` | See `cov`. |
| `l2` | `float` | — | `0.0` | See `cov`. |
| `residualise_l2` | `float` | — | `0.0` | Ridge for the residualisation step (passed to `residualise`). Typically left at `0`; raise if `Y` is near-collinear. |

**Returns** `Num` — shape `...` × `c` × `c`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:conditionalcov -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `c` | feature channels (channels-last) |
| `obs` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `d` | spatial dimension (2 or 3) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
